title: artemisia vulgaris var. candicans
intro: Artemisia vulgaris var. candicans, commonly known as white mugwort, is a variant of the mugwort plant that is characterized by its white or silvery-gray foliage. This plant has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include its ability to stimulate digestion, relieve pain, and reduce inflammation. The health benefits of white mugwort include its potential to aid in weight loss, improve sleep quality, and support the immune system. White mugwort can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
